case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. RUDY RENAN HERNANDEZ LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS--COSTUMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,202.49 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ LOPEZ, RUDY RENAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ LOPEZ, RUDY RENAN
